patterns_recognized: HARD CAP 1 unconditional at any negative edge on GOLD/PLATINUM: 6/14 COL@OAK (-17.48pp, pre-cap B+, COL won 23-9) is the season benchmark — no F-signal stack survives negative edge; market absorption of SP/lineup advantages is reliable regardless of signal strength.

F1* without independent F3 corroboration DOWNGRADE validated 3+ consecutive times (6/12 LAD@CHW, 6/13 NYY@TOR-direction, 6/14 ATL@NYM 8-1 blowout): starred thin-sample F1 as sole grading driver is structurally unreliable without F3 corroboration.

Carry-thesis DOWNGRADE overcorrects at |hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap| < 0.020: 6/14 TB@LAA misfired (TB won 8-3); revised rule requires gap > 0.020 OR simultaneous structural cap before applying DOWNGRADE on full_prob >= 0.62 picks.

D-grade dual-opposing signals (SP xERA AGAINST + PQI AGAINST pick simultaneously) is the strongest validated OVERRIDE trigger — confirmed 3+ times in 6/11-6/14 window; blocked today only by missing qualitative news and full_prob suppression gate.

B+ pre-cap grade without SP xERA dimension in grade_reasons is structurally vulnerable to SP blowup: 6/13 SD@BAL (F3=4532.3 + PQI, no SP xERA, lost 9-3); today PIT@OAK has the same structural gap (F5_bullpen_gap + PQI, no SP xERA scored).

MIA @ PHI.reasoning: HARD CAP 10 correctly blocks this pick (pick_prob=0.558, bottom bucket, pre-cap score=1 B-). Only F3_swing_take_gap=1408.7 fires; PQI opposes MIA by 18.1pp. Critically, fair_prob=0.336 is a 22pp market rejection — Vegas prices Zack Wheeler's PHI as a massive favorite, confirming the model's claimed +22pp edge is a Soft Cap 6.5 calibrator artifact. Wheeler is one of the NL's best SPs; the market discount is genuine, not a hallucination. CONFIRM SKIP.

KC @ WSH.reasoning: Mitch Spence has only 84 Statcast pitches season-to-date, below the 100-pitch xERA minimum. PENDING_SP_DATA hard stop is correctly applied. No directional commitment is possible without a qualified SP sample for the WSH home slot. CONFIRM no-pick.

NYM @ CIN.reasoning: Pre-cap A- (score=4): F3=2459.6, SP edge +0.47 xERA for Chase Burns over Myers, Stage agree (Δ=0.02). Strong directional stack for CIN. However HARD CAP 1 fires at -0.59pp — Burns' advantage is already priced into the market's closing line. confidence_downgrade=True adds structural uncertainty. HARD CAP 10 (pick_prob=0.535, bottom bucket) then zeros the grade. Both caps are unconditional regardless of pre-cap score. CONFIRM dual-cap SKIP.

SD @ STL.reasoning: Weakest fundamental stack on the slate: only Stage agree fires (pre-cap score=1 B-); no F-signal, no SP xERA, no PQI confirms STL. Edge is -4.87pp (negative). Wandy Peralta is listed as SD's SP — he is primarily a reliever, introducing SP uncertainty the xERA model may not capture cleanly. HARD CAP 10 (pick_prob=0.527, bottom bucket) zeros the grade. Single-dimension signal stack with negative edge: CONFIRM SKIP.

COL @ CHC.reasoning: All four grading dimensions affirm CHC: F3=4383.2, SP edge 2.00 xERA for Imanaga over Lorenzen, PQI confirms +27.3, Stage agree. Exceptional directional stack pre-cap. But edge is -12.95pp — the market has entirely absorbed Imanaga's advantage. Per 6/14 COL@OAK (-17.48pp, B+ pre-cap, 14-run blowout) and 6/12 PHI@MIL (-10.9pp): negative-edge PLATINUM/GOLD is unconditional regardless of F-signal strength. HARD CAP 1 fires correctly. CONFIRM SKIP.

DET @ HOU.reasoning: Only bet-eligible pick on this slate (grade=B, edge=9.86pp in [4,15]pp range, no caps fired). F3=1208.9 fires and SP edge +0.31 xERA supports HOU. The massive f5_full_delta=0.3932 (DET dominates F5, HOU only 24.2% in F5) and bullpen_fatigue flag are real concerns, but HOU full_prob=0.6353 activates the carry-thesis suppression gate (>= 0.62), blocking OVERRIDE. The 6/14 rule also blocks DOWNGRADE (|hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap|=0.0012 < 0.020 threshold). Stage disagree already penalized -1 in grade score. Moderate conviction only.

LAA @ ARI.reasoning: D-grade (-4): SP xERA 2.08 AGAINST ARI (Ureña/LAA > Nelson/ARI), PQI -28.0 against ARI, Stage 1/2 disagree (Δ=0.14), confidence_downgrade=True. ARI's full_prob=0.761 is driven by team_quality_mod=1 (DISABLED in grading), not today's matchup signals. This matches the D-grade dual-opposing pattern validated in 6/11-6/13. However, full_prob=0.761 >> 0.62 suppression gate and no qualitative injury or lineup news is available to support an OVERRIDE. CONFIRM D-grade SKIP; LAA holds structural matchup advantages.

PIT @ OAK.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 (-3.35pp negative edge) and HARD CAP 10 (pick_prob=0.523, bottom bucket) both fire. Pre-cap B+ (score=3): F5_bullpen_gap fires, PQI confirms +6.2, Stage agree (Δ=0.00). But no SP xERA dimension is scored — per 6/13 SD@BAL lesson (B+ without SP xERA, F3-only, lost 9-3 blowout), this stack is structurally incomplete. pick_prob=0.509 is the nearest coin-flip on the slate; confidence_downgrade=True confirms. Dual-cap SKIP confirmed.

TB @ LAD.reasoning: D-grade (-1): SP xERA 0.78 AGAINST LAD (Martinez/TB > Lauer/LAD) and PQI slightly against (-3.2) dominate the grade calculation. However F3_swing_take_gap=12793.6 is the largest on the slate — LAD's hitters structurally punish Martinez's pitch mix. F2_xwoba_gap=0.049 also fires. Stage agree (both stages favor LAD, Δ=0.085). Edge=1.92pp is below the 4pp staking floor; no stake path exists regardless of grade. D-grade correctly reflects the SP-against penalty; CONFIRM SKIP with LAD directionally favored by extreme lineup signals.

MIN @ TEX.reasoning: MIN probable SP not yet announced; pipeline correctly holds PENDING_SP_DATA until 100+ Statcast pitches are available. No directional commitment is possible. CONFIRM no-pick.
